title: Warehouse Management and Inventory Control
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable supply chain workshop for strengthening warehouse management and inventory control practice.
whyThisMatters: Warehouse Management and Inventory Control helps logistics, shipping, and warehouse teams improve warehouse management and inventory control with clearer routines and shared operating language. Participants work through Understand What Is Effective Warehouse Management All About, SEVEN Warehouse Management Control, and receiving control so daily coordination, documentation, and control become more consistent.
builtFor: Operations, logistics, warehouse, and administration teams
Supervisors responsible for records, stock, or process flow
Employees who coordinate daily operational handovers
walkAwayWith: Understand the key process requirements and operational risks.
Improve accuracy, coordination, and follow-through in daily work.
Apply practical controls to records, movement, storage, or handovers.
Identify improvements that support smoother operations.

modules.title: Understand What Is Effective Warehouse Management All About

methodologyCaption: Participants work through operational examples and practical exercises that connect process concepts to day-to-day responsibilities.
